text: Hello. Hi, this is Samantha with U.S. medical supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without freaking your finger. Do you have diabetes? I'm not. No. That's good. Take care now.
